description_long: This skateboard features a classic popsicle shape with a slightly concave black deck and upturned nose and tail. The top surface is covered in a solid black grip tape, providing traction for the rider. The deck is constructed from layered wood, visible along the edges, and is mounted on two metal trucks that connect to four small, hard wheels. The wheels are a light beige color and appear to be made of polyurethane, suitable for street skating. The trucks are metallic with a standard kingpin design and are attached to the underside of the deck. There are no visible brand logos or graphic designs on the deck, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grip-taped wooden deck, metal trucks, and beige street wheels. The deck is plain with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, highlighting the concave deck, upturned nose and tail, and both sets of wheels and trucks.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded nose of the deck, the width of the board, and the front pair of wheels partially visible beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the skateboard's profile, deck curvature, and both sets of wheels and trucks.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded tail of the deck, the width of the board, and the rear pair of wheels partially visible beneath.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and hard, beige, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin, metallic silver, no visible branding, classic shape
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern or graphics
